unhostedWallets.notes: Travel rule transmission does not apply to unhosted wallet transfers (no counterparty VASP). Risk-based approach: for transfers >= EUR 1,000 involving unhosted wallets with higher risk indicators, firms must verify wallet ownership. Not a blanket requirement.

rules.notes: UK Travel Rule (Part 7A, MLR 2017) applies to ALL cryptoasset transfers regardless of amount. Basic info (name, account number) required for all transfers. Above EUR 1,000: one additional identifier required for originator (address OR date of birth OR ID document number — alternatives, not all mandatory). Threshold defined in EUR per statute (Regulation 64C). Primary
